items.title: TIL: You can make HTTP requests without curl using Bash /dev/TCP
items.desc: Minimal container images often ship without curl, wget, or any HTTP client at all. Bash can open a TCP socket through /dev/tcp, which is enough to write a tiny HTTP/1.1 request by hand for quick check
